test: RESULT 11 / Theorem 3 — Counter-Gradient parameter C_G on a 3D active-buoyancy LES, reproduced on GPU
verdict: PARTIAL: counter-gradient flux present but no co-located melt hump
interpretation: C_G(band) = -0.326 > -1 means heat in the lee band is carried counter-gradient (the global pressure field's memory), which a down-gradient eddy diffusivity (C_G = -1 by construction) structurally cannot represent. The departure (C_G+1) peaks at +0.674. But it does not co-locate with a basal melt hump (peak R = 1.0004), so the result is honestly PARTIAL. Reproduces committed Fig 52 (52_theorem3_cg.json).
